rendering_notes.godot_runtime_asset_model: RGBA PNG textures, tilemap composite PNG previews, plus source task/table metadata
rendering_notes.detail: Static source tilemaps are decoded into Godot-friendly composite PNGs where possible. Source color fades, HBlank/VBlank effects, window masks, scanline offsets, affine transforms, dynamic repeated tilemap placement, and transition task playback remain future Godot-native Shader/Material/Animation presentation work.

tilemap_composite.source_operation: SET_TILE loop ORs BG palette bank 15 over a 30x20 tilemap.
Mugshot_SetGfx copies a 32x20 tilemap through SET_TILE; the generated composite uses purple as the default opponent mugshot reference palette.
FrontierLogo* decompresses a full BG0 tilemap after loading the Frontier logo palette into BG palette bank 15.
LoadLogoGfx decompresses the logo center tilemap before spawning animated circle sprites.
Frontier Squares copies this 4x4 block repeatedly into BG0; the generated image is a block preview, not the final full-screen animation.
Groudon_Init decompresses a full BG0 tilemap; palette flashing later streams 16-color frames into BG palette bank 15.
Kyogre_Init decompresses a full BG0 tilemap; palette flashing later streams 16-color frames into BG palette bank 15.
Rayquaza_SetGfx copies a 64x32 BG0 tilemap; Rayquaza_Init loads palette frame 5 into BG palette bank 15 before the palette flash.
Regice_SetGfx copies a full BG0 tilemap after loading the Regice palette into BG palette bank 15.
Regirock_SetGfx copies a full BG0 tilemap after loading the Regirock palette into BG palette bank 15.
Registeel_SetGfx copies a full BG0 tilemap after loading the Registeel palette into BG palette bank 15.
Aqua_SetGfx decompresses a full BG0 tilemap after loading the evil-team palette into BG palette bank 15.
Magma_SetGfx decompresses a full BG0 tilemap after loading the evil-team palette into BG palette bank 15.
Unreferenced transition asset in the current source task table; decoded for asset completeness only.
